data.name: Company has an approved Code of Conduct
data.description: This test verifies that your company has an approved [Code of Conduct](/policies/code-of-conduct-bsi) in Vanta.
data.failureDescription: You don't have an approved Code of Conduct yet.
data.remediationDescription: Use our [policy templates](/policies?policy=Code%20of%20Conduct) to create and approve a custom Code of Conduct for your company.
